title: F-Tech: Robots | CC Compat
description: Adds a new peripheral for "CC:Restitched" computers to write build instructions for "F-Tech: Robots"
body:
This is a mod to bridge:
- [F-Tech: Robots](https://modrinth.com/mod/f-tech-robots)
- [CC: Tweaked](https://modrinth.com/mod/cc-tweaked)

It adds a new type of build instruction item and CC peripheral, the item can be inserted into the peripheral.

A computer using the peripheral can then add build instructions to the item (or clear them).

For info on how to do this check out the [README](https://gitlab.com/billyg270/f-tech-robots-cc-compat)
